name: Concrete Leveling Systems Inc
summary: Concrete Leveling Systems, Inc. is a Nevada corporation incorporated in 2007, operating under the trade name CLS Fabricating, Inc. in Ohio. The company fabricates and markets a concrete leveling service unit that mixes lime with water and pumps the mixture under pressure to raise flat concrete surfaces. It is also pursuing a pending acquisition of Jericho Associates, Inc. to enter the casino gaming, hospitality, and entertainment industries, though the transaction remains contingent on regulatory and financing conditions.

products.name: Concrete Leveling Service Unit
products.description: A truck-mounted unit with a mixing device for lime and water and a pump to inject the mixture under pressure into pre-drilled holes to raise flat concrete surfaces.

partnerships.description: Equity Purchase Agreement to acquire all outstanding common stock of Jericho, a company in gaming, hospitality, and entertainment; contingent on regulatory review, closing documentation, and financing.
